cross_vertical_goal: extract reusable evaluation patterns for open-source file conversion libraries used in LLM/RAG pipelines
current_project_scope: map to active AI/RAG ingestion pipelines where relevant
future_project_scope: preserve value for any team evaluating document-to-markdown conversion for LLM workflows
mode_rationale: User explicitly requested deep pass; topic involves file parsing with broad attack surface (SSRF, path traversal, arbitrary code execution via format handlers) which triggers security_review_required
user_request:
new topic: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown

deep pass on it

once complete do another security audit; put the output in the _pipeline folder with all the others.

related_topics.relation: prior evaluation of same library (Microsoft MarkItDown) completed 2026-04-24 — same codebase, different pipeline run

token_usage.director_note: Director session tokens not captured per-subagent — run /cost at pipeline end for full session total

cost_estimate_usd.note: Blended rates (60/40 input/output split): Sonnet ~$8/M, Opus ~$39/M. Subagent total only — excludes Director (Opus) session tokens; run /cost for full session.
